refnamediv.refpurpose: A composite type used as input into the ST_Reclass function defining the behavior of reclassification.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: A composite type used as input into the function defining the behavior of reclassification.

listitem.para: The band number of band to reclassify.

range expression consisting of comma delimited range:map_range mappings. : to define mapping that defines how to map old band values to new band values. ( means >, ) means less than, ] < or equal, [ means > or equal
( notation is optional so a-b means the same as (a-b)
One of defined pixel types as described in
Value to treat as no data. For image outputs that support transparency, these will be blank.

refsection.title: Example: Reclassify band 2 as an 8BUI where 255 is nodata value
Example: Reclassify band 1 as an 1BB and no nodata value defined
